import React,{useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function TaskForm(_ref){let{onAdd}=_ref;const[title,setTitle]=useState('');const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState(null);async function handleSubmit(e){e.preventDefault();const t=title.trim();if(!t)return;setLoading(true);setError(null);try{await onAdd(t);// only clear input on success
